hooks.message:
## CRISPY Protocol Reminder

You are operating under the CRISPY sub-agent protocol (`SUBAGENTS.md`).

**Return shape:** End your final message with a fenced ```crispy-result``` block (§3):
```yaml
status: ok | partial | failed
agent: <your-agent-name>
artifact_path: <path or null>
summary: |
  <2-6 line summary>
findings: []
next_actions: []
metadata: {}
```

**Severity vocabulary** (§6): `high` (blocks), `medium` (append & continue), `low` (append & continue). No other words (`nit`, `critical`, emoji) are permitted.

**Failure handling** (§8): On tool error → wait 5-10s, retry once. On persistent failure → return `status: failed`. On missing input → return `status: partial` with `next_actions: [provide X]`.

**Anti-patterns** (§10): Do not re-read artifacts already summarized in a `crispy-result`. Do not spawn `rubber-duck` yourself (only the orchestrator gates). Do not write artifacts the orchestrator didn't authorize.
hooks.description: Inject CRISPY protocol context into every sub-agent prompt
Check for uncommitted changes before any branch operation
Verify current branch before creating a new feature branch
